response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine AI-native engineering experience through current work on MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure, which directly matches the role's baseline expectation. His Sociomantic tenure demonstrates real high-throughput distributed systems work at scale. However, Python is entirely absent from his skills and work history despite being a must-have for this role, which is a material gap. His distributed systems depth is also concentrated in a period from 2011–2013, and the resume offers limited evidence of the cross-functional stakeholder management and technical strategy ownership expected at Staff level in this context.
strengths: Active hands-on contribution to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role, directly matching the AI-native engineering baseline
Demonstrated high-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency, async I/O design
Long Staff-level tenure with breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and data-platform domains supporting systems-thinking depth
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume and skills list despite being a stated must-have technical requirement
Distributed systems depth is concentrated in 2011–2013; current work is primarily product-focused TypeScript/Node.js with no evidence of recent high-throughput architecture ownership
No explicit evidence of stakeholder management, cross-functional technical strategy, or incident-response and on-call ownership
